scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix backend && npm run lint --prefix frontend
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix --prefix backend && npm run lint:fix --prefix frontend
scripts.audit-check: npm run audit-check --prefix backend && npm run audit-check --prefix frontend
scripts.security-check: npm run lint && npm run audit-check
